This is a Django AI Portfolio Website project.

Always refer to PROJECT_SPEC.md and UI_BUILD_INSTRUCTIONS.md for requirements.

Rules:
- Django-first. No React, Vue, or Next.js.
- Tailwind CSS only. Minimal custom CSS.
- Use template inheritance with base.html and partials.
- Always create files in their correct Django app directories.
- Never dump files into the project root.
- Apps: core, projects, blog, contact, accounts.
- Templates go in templates/<appname>/ subdirectories.
- Follow the folder structure in UI_BUILD_INSTRUCTIONS.md exactly.
